description: CIS Microsoft 365 Foundations Benchmark controls mapped to AuditXpert assessment checks. Covers identity, email, device, and app security controls for M365 environments.

1.1.1.title: Ensure multi-factor authentication is enabled for all users
1.1.1.evidence: MFA enrollment percentage across all licensed users, users without any MFA method registered

1.1.4.title: Ensure the number of Global Administrators is less than 5
1.1.4.evidence: Count of active Global Administrator role assignments, permanent vs. PIM-eligible assignments

1.1.5.title: Ensure Privileged Identity Management is used to manage just-in-time access
1.1.5.evidence: PIM eligibility ratio, standing vs. eligible role assignments, privileged role activation logs

1.1.6.title: Ensure legacy authentication is blocked
1.1.6.evidence: Conditional Access policy blocking legacy authentication protocols (Exchange ActiveSync legacy, POP3, IMAP, SMTP Auth)

1.1.9.title: Ensure Microsoft Authenticator number matching is enabled
1.1.9.evidence: Authentication Methods policy — number matching configuration status for Microsoft Authenticator

1.2.1.title: Ensure Conditional Access policies are configured
1.2.1.evidence: Number of active CA policies, policy coverage across users/applications, broad exclusions

1.2.2.title: Ensure legacy authentication is blocked via Conditional Access
1.2.2.evidence: CA policy with client app condition targeting legacy authentication clients in block mode

1.2.6.title: Ensure sign-in risk policy is configured
1.2.6.evidence: Identity Protection sign-in risk policy configuration, risk levels covered, enforcement action (block/MFA)

1.2.7.title: Ensure user risk policy is configured
1.2.7.evidence: Identity Protection user risk policy configuration, risk levels covered, enforcement action (block/password change)

1.3.1.title: Ensure application credentials are rotated regularly
1.3.1.evidence: Application secrets/certificates approaching or past expiry, long-lived credentials (>1 year), expired credentials

2.1.1.title: Ensure that external mail forwarding is blocked
2.1.1.evidence: Inbox rules forwarding to external addresses, transport rules with external redirect actions

2.2.1.title: Ensure anti-spam policies are configured
2.2.1.evidence: Transport rules bypassing spam filtering (SCL -1), external anti-spam bypass rules

2.3.1.title: Ensure anti-phishing policies are configured
2.3.1.evidence: Anti-phishing policy configuration, spoof intelligence settings, first contact safety tips

2.3.2.title: Ensure impersonation protection is enabled
2.3.2.evidence: User and domain impersonation protection settings, mailbox intelligence configuration

2.4.1.title: Ensure Safe Links policies are configured
2.4.1.evidence: Defender for Office 365 Safe Links policy existence and configuration, URL scanning on click

2.4.2.title: Ensure Safe Attachments policies are configured
2.4.2.evidence: Defender for Office 365 Safe Attachments policy existence, action on malware detection

2.5.1.title: Ensure sign-in to shared mailboxes is blocked
2.5.1.evidence: Shared mailboxes with accountEnabled=true (direct sign-in enabled)

2.6.1.title: Ensure DMARC records are configured for all domains
2.6.1.evidence: DMARC DNS record presence per domain, policy enforcement level (none/quarantine/reject)

3.1.1.title: Ensure device compliance policies are configured and enforced
3.1.1.evidence: Device compliance percentage, compliance policies per platform (Windows/iOS/Android/macOS), policy assignments

3.4.1.title: Ensure BitLocker (or equivalent) disk encryption is enabled
3.4.1.evidence: Device isEncrypted field per managed device, unencrypted device count by OS type

3.5.1.title: Ensure Windows Update for Business is configured
3.5.1.evidence: Windows Update for Business ring configuration, outdated OS version count, patch compliance

4.1.1.title: Ensure Microsoft Defender for Endpoint is configured and onboarded
4.1.1.evidence: Defender for Endpoint device onboarding coverage, sensor health, management agent types

coverage_calculation: Number of controls with at least one passing check / total mapped controls × 100

scoring.method: Weighted score based on control criticality
scoring.note: Controls 1.1.1 (MFA), 1.1.4 (Global Admins), 2.1.1 (Forwarding), 2.6.1 (DMARC) are commonly flagged in CIS assessments
